flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Wisconsin-Oshkosh fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (8.4k → 6.9k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at University of Wisconsin-Oshkosh fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (55.2% → 46.1%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Wisconsin-Oshkosh rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.7k → $8.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Wisconsin-Oshkosh fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8% → 0.0%).
